details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts
alias: repair_ledger_faucet_parts
purchased_on: 2026-01-03
total_eur: 32
counterparty: Hörnbach Österreich
project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Petra Novak
lines:
  - item: faucet cartridge
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 24
  - item: seal set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Kitchen faucet repair parts

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                            |
| bill_id        | bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts |
| alias          | repair_ledger_faucet_parts      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-01-03                      |
| total_eur      | 32                              |
| counterparty   | Hörnbach Österreich             |
| project        | Repair Ledger                   |
| related_entity | Petra Novak                     |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | faucet cartridge | 1   | 24       | 24       |
| 2 | seal set         | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 32       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Exactly the kind of household fix that becomes folklore unless Miles captures the receipt and part numbers.

next_step.observation: Wrote YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_03__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md with original body preserved below.

function.message:
Handled the next inbox item by OCR-migrating all Petra Novak-related bills in `50_finance/purchases/` to YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body. Updated files:
- `50_finance/purchases/2026_01_03__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md`
- `50_finance/purchases/2026_04_12__eur_000020__bill__studio_parts_magnet_and_felt.md`
Then removed the processed inbox request file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, used finance schema for exact bill fields, preserved full original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity file `10_entities/cast/petra.md` identified Petra. Finance purchases search on structured related_entity linkage found two Petra-related bills, both read and containing complete required schema fields. Both records were migrated to schema-compliant frontmatter with unchanged original bodies preserved beneath, satisfying OCR/migration workflows and finance schema guidance. Inbox request file was then deleted per inbox workflow.
